title: Regulated advice memo
summary: Neutral-risk client with a 10-year horizon and medium liquidity need is advised a diversified equity fund; suitability confirmed.
email_body: Dear Demo Family Trust, we recommend diversified equity fund (SYN-FUND-42) based on your neutral risk profile and 10-year horizon.

suitability.rationale: horizon exceeds five years and liquidity need is not high
